channel.title: KinNoKi Labs
channel.description: We build native applications for Apple platforms with an emphasis on clarity, performance, and craftsmanship.

item.title: Visual Timer
item.content:encoded:
Visual Timer

Visual Timer is a clean, intuitive countdown timer built for Apple Watch and iOS.

Designed for simplicity, it helps you stay focused by providing a clear, glanceable representation of time remaining. Perfect for productivity, studying, and time management.

Available on iOS and watchOS.

item.title: Odysseus
item.content:encoded:
Odysseus

Odysseus is a self-hosted AI workspace — meant to be the self-hosted version of the UI experience you get from ChatGPT and Claude, running on your own hardware, with your own data. Local-first, privacy-first, and highly capable.

Features:

  • Chat & Agents: Chat with local models or APIs, and run fully autonomous agent tasks.
  • Deep Research: Multi-step runs that gather, read, and synthesize sources into a report.
  • Memory & Skills: Persistent memory and skills so your agent evolves over time.
  • Email, Notes & Calendar: Built-in triage, reminders, and CalDAV sync.
  • Mobile Friendly: Works great on mobile as an installable PWA.

item.title: NS Marks The Spot
item.content:encoded:
NS Marks The Spot

NS Marks The Spot is an open-source iOS map app that overlays georeferenced historical maps of Nova Scotia (such as Fletcher maps and the David Rumsey collection) on modern maps.

Users can easily control overlay transparency with a slider to compare historical cartography with present-day geography, and view custom vector layers for Points of Interest like waterfalls.

Available on iOS.

item.title: MacroMark
item.content:encoded:
MacroMark

MacroMark is a zero-friction, voice-to-text capture tool designed for personal knowledge management (PKM) power users. It provides an unparalleled on-the-go dictation experience for your Apple Watch, syncing seamlessly to plain-text Markdown files on your iPhone via iCloud Drive.

Features:

  • Zero-Friction Capture: Tap the complication, speak, and lower your wrist. Your note is saved instantly.
  • The Append Mechanic: Intelligently appends all your captures for a given day to a single daily note.
  • Verbal Macros: Speak custom trigger words to instantly format your text (e.g. "Heading One").
  • PKM Friendly: Saves directly to iCloud Documents, accessible to Obsidian, Logseq, and more.

Available on iOS and watchOS.

item.title: Echo: Audiobook Study Player
item.content:encoded:
Echo: Audiobook Study Player

Echo turns audiobooks into a serious study medium. Search across spoken content, jump to any passage, create flashcards from what you hear, and review with spaced repetition — all without leaving the audio.

Echo bridges the gap between reading and listening: a synced EPUB sits alongside your audiobook so you can follow the text while you hear it, jump between the two, and never lose your place.

Features:

  • Intermittent Attention Support: Smart rewind ensures you never lose context when you hit play after a pause.
  • Chapter Looping & Voice Memos: Loop chapters until absorbed, and leave voice memos on bookmarks.
  • Spaced Repetition (SRS): Built-in flashcard system using the SM-2 algorithm.
  • True ePub Alignment: On-device auto-alignment maps every paragraph to the narration.
  • Apple Watch Remote: Complete control from your wrist.

Available on iOS, macOS, and watchOS.

item.title: My first post
item.description: A description of my first post.
